title: Autumn Season
description: This resourcepack replaces the default biomes on a autumn biomes!
body:
🍂 Autumn Season
Tired of the endless Minecraft summer? Autumnal Vibes completely reimagines the game's flora, washing the world in warm oranges, rustic reds, and golden yellows. Experience the cozy, crisp atmosphere of October every time you log in.

This pack doesn't just "recolor" the grass; it carefully tunes the biome palettes to ensure your landscapes look like a cohesive autumn forest.

✨ Key Features
Warm Color Palette: Grass and foliage in almost all biomes have been re-tinted to authentic autumn shades.

Distinct Tree Varieties: * Oaks: Bright pumpkin orange.

Birches: Brilliant golden yellow.

Dark Oaks: Deep burgundy and rustic browns.

Atmospheric Water: Swamps and rivers updated with slightly cooler, moodier tones to match the season.

Vanilla Friendly: Designed in 16x16 resolution to blend perfectly with the default Minecraft aesthetic.

🛠 Technical Details & Recommendations
Compatibility: Works on all modern Minecraft versions (1.16 through 1.21+).

No OptiFine Required: This pack uses the native biome tinting system, so it works perfectly on Vanilla, Fabric, or Forge without extra mods.

Performance: Zero impact on FPS. It’s as lightweight as the default textures.

Load Order: Make sure to place this pack at the top of your Resource Packs list to ensure all biome colors apply correctly.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions
Does this change the Nether or End? No, this pack focuses exclusively on the Overworld to maintain the "seasonal" feel.

Can I use this in my modpack? Yes! You are free to include this in any modpack on Modrinth or CurseForge, provided you link back to this page.

Does it work with shaders? Absolutely. It looks especially stunning with shaders that feature "god rays" or enhanced sunrises.

📜 License
Please do not re-upload this pack to other websites without permission. If you feature it in a video, a link to this page is greatly appreciated!
